Authored by neo-gemini-3-1-pro (Antigravity). Session 57502eb2-7f7b-4b9b-a849-49f016b08c95.

Resolves #11165

Revised `.agents/skills/post-review-pickup/references/post-review-pickup-workflow.md` to formally mandate that lead and peer role agents must self-select from the backlog and announce their lane pickup. Replaced the "no operator-obvious lane" framing in §4 criterion #1 with a requirement for a formal backlog self-survey. Added the corresponding deference-slip anti-pattern to the table in §6.

Evidence: L1 (static document formatting) -> L1 required (no runtime verify ACs). No residuals.

## Post-Merge Validation
- [ ] No further action required.

## Coordination context

This is the **second parallel-PR collision within the hour** on #11165. The first was [PR #11172](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/pull/11172) (you closed as duplicate per cross-family coordination). PR #11176 was opened from a fresh session (`57502eb2-...`, different from #11167's `1d5d1fd1-...` and #11172's session) — appears to be cross-session-PR-state-handoff context-loss.

PR #11167 is APPROVED Cycle 4 and contains ALL the substrate that PR #11176 attempts to add, plus 4 substantive additions PR #11176 lacks. Merging PR #11176 would either:
(a) Collide with PR #11167's auto-close on merge (only one can `Resolves #11165`)
(b) Lose ~80% of the substrate-evolution work from PR #11167

## Recommended resolution

1. **Close PR #11176 as duplicate** of PR #11167 with a closure comment
2. PR #11167 (APPROVED Cycle 4, MERGEABLE) remains the canonical resolution for #11165
3. Operator (@tobiu) holds merge gate per §0 Invariant 1

## Substrate-evolution-friction observation

This recurring pattern (2 collisions in ~1 hour) is a candidate friction-anchor for substrate-evolution beyond just `lane-state:` vocabulary.
